assistant_message.content:

  "finding_id": "openscap_014",
  "rule_id": "Modify the System Login Banner",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",

  "rationale": "The rule only edits /etc/issue to change the login banner text. This does not alter authentication mechanisms, lock out users, or affect system stability. The change can be safely undone and tested before production use.",

  ],

  "touches_authn_authz": false,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": true
}
